rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Waste in material or time indicates process improvement opportunity.
suggestedActions: Optimize drying/cooling parameters for cycle time reduction.
Monitor defects and adjust process conditions accordingly.

description.short: Calculate minimum draft angle for part ejection from mold.
description.long: Calculate minimum draft angle for part ejection from mold.

short_i18n.en: Calculate minimum draft angle for part ejection from mold.
short_i18n.tr: Parcanin kaliptan siyrilmasi icin gereken Minimum koniklik/draft acisini hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den minimalen Entformungswinkel fur die Teileausstoßung aus der Form.
short_i18n.fr: Calculez l'angle de dépouille minimal pour l'éjection de la pièce du moule.
short_i18n.es: Calcular el ángulo de desmoldeo mínimo para la expulsión de la pieza del molde.
short_i18n.ar: احسب زاوية القالب الدنيا لخروج القطعة من القالب.
